questions.question: Bijli ke kaam karte samay sabse pehle kya ensure karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Electrical work shuru karne se pehle, safety ke liye power supply ko band karna sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek electrician ko shock se bachne ke liye kaun sa PPE pehanna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Insulated gloves bijli ke jhatke se bachne ke liye direct contact ko rokte hain.

questions.question: Live wire ko touch karne par kya ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Live wire ko touch karne par electric shock lag sakta hai, jo jaanleva bhi ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool wire cutting aur stripping ke liye use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Wire stripper specifically wires ki insulation ko hatane aur unhe cut karne ke liye design kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Multimeter ka kya use hai?

options.B: Voltage, current aur resistance measure karna

questions.explanation: Multimeter ek versatile tool hai jo voltage (volts), current (amperes), aur resistance (ohms) ko measure karta hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko electric shock lage toh pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Sabse pehle power source ko band karna chahiye taaki vyakti aur baki log surakshit rahein.

questions.question: Insulated screwdriver ka blade kis material se bana hota hai?
questions.explanation: Insulated screwdriver ka blade steel se bana hota hai, lekin uski handle aur blade ka kuch hissa non-conductive material (jaise rubber ya plastic) se cover hota hai safety ke liye.

questions.question: Kon si fire class electric fire ke liye suitable hai?
questions.explanation: Class C fire electrical equipment mein hoti hai aur iske liye CO2 ya dry chemical extinguishers ka use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Test lamp ka use kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.A: Wire ki lambai maapne ke liye
options.B: Circuit mein voltage presence check karne ke liye
options.D: Wires ko twist karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Test lamp ya neon tester ka use circuit mein live wire ya voltage ki presence ko detect karne ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Conduit pipe bending ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Conduit pipes ko sahi angle par bend karne ke liye pipe bender ka upyog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Ek faulty extension cord ka use karne se kya ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Faulty extension cords, jaise damaged insulation ya loose connections wale, short circuit, overheating aur fire ke khatre paida kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedure ka kya maqsad hai?

options.B: Accidentally power supply on hone se rokna
options.C: Customer ke ghar ko lock karna

questions.explanation: LOTO ka maqsad hai ki maintenance ya repair work ke dauraan machine ya circuit ko accidentally energize hone se roka jaye, jisse workers ki safety bani rahe.

questions.question: Bench vice ka primary use kya hai?
questions.explanation: Bench vice ek clamping device hai jo workpiece ko majbooti se pakad kar rakhta hai taaki uspar aasani se kaam kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Electrical panel mein kaam karte samay kaun sa tool non-metallic hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Fish tape, jo wires ko conduits se khinchne ke liye use hota hai, non-metallic (jaise fiberglass) hone par live circuits ke saath kaam karte samay shock ka khatra kam karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek wire bahut garam ho raha hai toh iska kya karan ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Wire ka garam hona usually overload (uspe zyada current flow ho raha hai) ya loose connection ki wajah se hota hai, jo resistance badha deta hai aur heat generate karta hai.

questions.question: Safety shoe mein kaun sa feature electrician ke liye zaroori hai?

options.C: Anti-static ya electrical hazard (EH) rated sole

questions.explanation: Anti-static ya Electrical Hazard (EH) rated sole wale safety shoes electric shock se bachav provide karte hain.

questions.question: Ek electrician ko apne tools ko regularly check aur maintain kyu karna chahiye?

options.A: Customer ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Tools ki lifespan badhane aur safety ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Naye tools kharidne se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance se tools ki working condition theek rehti hai, unki life badhti hai, aur sabse important, kaam karte samay safety bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Current ki unit kya hai?
questions.explanation: Electric current ko Amperes (A) mein measure kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Voltage ki unit kya hai?
questions.explanation: Voltage ya potential difference ko Volts (V) mein measure kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Ohm's Law ka formula kya hai?
questions.explanation: Ohm's Law ke according, Voltage (V) = Current (I) x Resistance (R).

questions.question: AC current ka full form kya hai?
questions.explanation: AC ka matlab Alternating Current hai, jisme current ki disha periodically badalti rehti hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa material ek acha conductor hai?
questions.explanation: Copper ek excellent electrical conductor hai, isliye iska use wiring mein extensively hota hai.

questions.question: Series circuit mein total resistance kaise calculate karte hain?
questions.explanation: Series circuit mein, total resistance individual resistances ka sum hota hai.

questions.question: Parallel circuit mein agar ek bulb fuse ho jaye toh baki bulbs ka kya hoga?
questions.explanation: Parallel circuit mein har component ka apna alag path hota hai, isliye ek component ke fail hone se baki components par asar nahi padta.

questions.question: Power (Wattage) ka formula kya hai?
questions.explanation: Electrical power (P) ko calculate karne ka formula Voltage (V) multiplied by Current (I) hai.

questions.question: Kilowatt-hour (kWh) kiski unit hai?
questions.explanation: Kilowatt-hour (kWh) electricity bill mein energy consumption ko measure karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Kon sa device electrical energy ko mechanical energy mein convert karta hai?
questions.explanation: Motor electrical energy ko mechanical energy mein convert karta hai, jaise fans aur pumps mein.

questions.question: Domestic wiring mein generally kaun sa current use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Gharon mein supply hone wala current Alternating Current (AC) hota hai, jo long distances par efficiently transmit ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Frequency ki unit kya hai?
questions.explanation: Frequency ko Hertz (Hz) mein measure kiya jata hai, jo per second cycles ki sankhya batata hai.

questions.question: Agar ek wire ka resistance badhana ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.C: Wire ki lambai badhayein ya uska cross-sectional area kam karein
options.D: Wire ka material change karein to conductor

questions.explanation: Resistance wire ki lambai ke directly proportional aur cross-sectional area ke inversely proportional hota hai. Lambai badhane ya area kam karne se resistance badhega.

questions.question: Ek ideal insulator ki kya property hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Insulator woh material hota hai jo current flow ko resist karta hai, isliye uski resistance bahut high hoti hai.

questions.question: Capacitor ka primary function kya hai?
questions.explanation: Capacitor electrical charge ko store karta hai aur use circuit mein release kar sakta hai, jaise fans mein starting torque provide karna.

questions.question: Indian domestic supply voltage kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: India mein standard domestic single-phase supply voltage 230 Volts hota hai.

questions.question: Power factor kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Kitna current flow ho raha hai
options.C: Electrical energy kitni efficiently use ho rahi hai

questions.explanation: Power factor batata hai ki kitni electrical power actual work mein convert ho rahi hai. High power factor matlab better efficiency.

questions.question: Domestic wiring mein commonly kaun sa wire insulation use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Polyvinyl Chloride (PVC) insulation domestic wiring mein sabse zyada use hota hai uski durability, flexibility aur heat resistance ki wajah se.

questions.question: Two-way switch ka use kahaan hota hai?

options.A: Ek light ko ek jagah se control karna
options.B: Ek light ko do ya do se zyada jagahon se control karna
options.C: Do lights ko ek jagah se control karna

questions.explanation: Two-way switch ka use staircases ya long corridors mein ek light ko do alag-alag points se operate karne ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: MCB ka full form kya hai?
questions.explanation: MCB ka full form Miniature Circuit Breaker hai, jo overload aur short circuit se protection provide karta hai.

questions.question: Distribution board (DB) ka kya function hai?

options.B: Incoming electrical supply ko circuits mein distribute karna aur protect karna

questions.explanation: DB ghar ki main electrical supply ko alag-alag circuits mein divide karta hai aur har circuit ko MCB/RCCB ke through protect karta hai.

questions.question: Concealed wiring ka kya fayda hai?
questions.explanation: Concealed wiring diwaron ke andar hoti hai, isliye yeh ghar ko saaf-suthra look deti hai aur physical damage se wires ko bachati hai, jisse safety badhti hai.

questions.question: Neutral wire ka colour code kya hota hai (Indian standards ke according)?
questions.explanation: Indian standards ke according, neutral wire ka colour code generally Black hota hai.

questions.question: Earthing wire ka colour code kya hota hai (Indian standards ke according)?
questions.explanation: Indian standards ke according, earthing wire ka colour code Green hota hai.

questions.question: Socket outlet mein live, neutral aur earth connection kis order mein hote hain?
questions.explanation: Standard 3-pin socket mein, top pin Earth ke liye (sabse bada), right pin Live ke liye, aur left pin Neutral ke liye hota hai (front se dekhne par).

questions.question: PVC conduit pipe ka use kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.B: Electrical wires ko protect aur conceal karne ke liye

questions.explanation: PVC conduit pipes electrical wires ko mechanical damage aur moisture se bachane ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Fan regulator ka kya function hai?

options.C: Fan ko reverse direction mein chalana

questions.explanation: Fan regulator fan ko milne wale voltage ko adjust karke uski speed ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek circuit mein bahut zyada appliances connect kar diye jayen toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Overload aur MCB trip ho jayegi

questions.explanation: Zyada appliances connect karne se circuit overload ho jata hai, jisse MCB trip ho jati hai taaki wiring ko damage se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Loop-in system of wiring ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Joints kam hote hain aur fault finding aasan hota hai

questions.explanation: Loop-in system mein connections directly switchboard ya junction box se kiye jate hain, jisse wire joints kam hote hain aur troubleshooting easy ho jati hai.

questions.question: Domestic wiring mein 1.5 sq mm wire generally kis load ke liye use hota hai?
questions.explanation: 1.5 sq mm copper wire typically light aur fan circuits ke liye use hota hai, jinka load kam hota hai. Heavy appliances ke liye zyada thick wire (e.g., 2.5 sq mm ya 4 sq mm) use hota hai.

questions.question: Gang box ka kya use hai?

options.B: Switches, sockets aur regulators ko mount karna

questions.explanation: Gang box woh enclosure hai jisme switches, sockets aur other accessories ko diwar mein fix kiya jata hai.

questions.question: PVC casing and capping wiring system ka primary advantage kya hai?

options.B: Economical aur easy to install for surface wiring

questions.explanation: Casing and capping wiring surface wiring ke liye ek economical aur relatively easy installation method hai.

questions.question: Current rating of an MCB kis par depend karta hai?
questions.explanation: MCB ki current rating circuit ke expected load aur usme use hone wale wire ke current carrying capacity par depend karti hai, taaki overload hone par woh trip ho sake.

questions.question: Ek naye ghar mein wiring karne se pehle kya plan karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Electrical load calculation aur circuit layout design

questions.explanation: Sahi electrical load calculation aur circuit layout design ek safe aur efficient wiring system ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar ek fan dheere chal raha hai toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Capacitor weak ho gaya hai ya bearing jam ho gaya hai
options.C: Fan ka blade toot gaya hai
options.D: Fan ko zyada power mil rahi hai

questions.explanation: Fan ke dheere chalne ka common karan weak capacitor ya jam bearings hote hain.

questions.question: Iron garam nahi ho rahi hai, kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Power cord, thermostat aur heating element ki continuity

questions.explanation: Iron ke garam na hone par power cord mein break, faulty thermostat ya damaged heating element ho sakta hai. Inki continuity multimeter se check karni chahiye.

questions.question: Refrigerator ke compressor ko start hone mein problem aa rahi hai, kya suspect kar sakte hain?

options.B: Compressor ka starting relay ya overload protector faulty hai

questions.explanation: Compressor ke start na hone ka ek common karan starting relay ya overload protector ka faulty hona hai.

questions.question: Multimeter ko voltage measure karne ke liye kis mode par set karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Voltage measure karne ke liye multimeter ko ACV (Alternating Current Voltage) ya DCV (Direct Current Voltage) mode par set karna hota hai, depending on the circuit type.

questions.question: Agar ek light switch kaam nahi kar raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Switch ke connections aur bulb ki condition

questions.explanation: Light switch ke kaam na karne par, pehle switch ke terminals par wiring connections aur bulb ki working condition check karni chahiye.

questions.question: Geyser se garam paani nahi aa raha hai, kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Heating element ya thermostat kharab hai
options.D: Bijli ka bill kam aa raha hai

questions.explanation: Geyser se garam paani na aane ka common karan heating element ka jal jana ya thermostat ka faulty hona hai.

questions.question: Ek short circuit ko kaise pehchante hain?

options.B: MCB trip ho jati hai aur fuse ud jata hai

questions.explanation: Short circuit mein high current flow hota hai, jisse protection devices jaise MCB ya fuse turant activate ho jate hain.

questions.question: Continuity test kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.C: Circuit mein complete path (connection) hai ya nahi, ye check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Continuity test se pata chalta hai ki wire, fuse ya switch mein koi break toh nahi hai aur current flow ho sakta hai ya nahi.

questions.question: Agar ek socket mein power nahi aa rahi hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Sabse pehle us socket se connected circuit ke MCB ko check karna chahiye, ho sakta hai woh trip ho gaya ho.

questions.question: Electric kettle garam nahi ho rahi hai, kya possible cause ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Electric kettle ke garam na hone ka mukhya karan uska heating element ya thermostat ka kharab hona hai.

questions.question: Microwave oven chalte chalte band ho gaya, kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Door interlock switch, fuse ya power supply

questions.explanation: Microwave oven ke band hone par, door interlock switch, internal fuse, ya power supply mein problem ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Voltage drop ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Circuit mein resistance ki wajah se voltage kam ho gaya hai

questions.explanation: Voltage drop tab hota hai jab wire ke resistance ke karan source se load tak pahunchte pahunchte voltage kam ho jata hai, jisse appliances ki performance affect hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar ek bulb bar bar fuse ho raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.C: Bulb ko kam power mil rahi hai

questions.explanation: Bulb ka bar bar fuse hona over-voltage, loose connection ya vibration ki wajah se ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Water heater ke thermostat ka kya function hai?

options.B: Pani ke temperature ko regulate karna

questions.explanation: Thermostat pani ke temperature ko monitor karta hai aur use set point par maintain karne ke liye heating element ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Ceiling fan mein winding short hone par kya hoga?

options.B: Fan slow chalega ya bilkul nahi chalega, aur garam ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Winding short hone par resistance kam ho jata hai, jisse current badhta hai aur fan ya toh slow ho jayega, chalega nahi, ya overheat ho jayega.

questions.question: Washing machine mein power supply hone ke baad bhi start na hone ka kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Door lock switch, main PCB ya motor capacitor faulty hai

questions.explanation: Washing machine start na hone par door lock switch, main control board (PCB) ya motor capacitor mein problem ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Ek appliance ki rating plate par kya information milti hai?
questions.explanation: Rating plate par appliance ke electrical parameters jaise operating voltage, power consumption (wattage), current rating aur frequency mention hoti hai, jo installation aur troubleshooting ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Earthing kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Bijli ka bill kam karne ke liye
options.B: Electric shock se bachav aur electrical appliances ko protect karne ke liye
options.C: Wires ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.D: Light ko tez karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Earthing fault current ko zameen mein divert karke electric shock se bachata hai aur appliances ko damage se protect karta hai.

questions.question: RCCB ka full form kya hai?
questions.explanation: RCCB ka full form Residual Current Circuit Breaker hai.

questions.question: RCCB ka primary function kya hai?
questions.explanation: RCCB especially earth leakage current ko detect karta hai aur turant circuit ko disconnect kar deta hai, jisse electric shock ka khatra kam hota hai.

questions.question: Fuse kis principle par kaam karta hai?
questions.explanation: Fuse heating effect of current par kaam karta hai. Jab current rating se zyada hota hai, toh fuse wire garam ho kar melt ho jata hai aur circuit break kar deta hai.

questions.question: MCB kitne type ke hote hain domestic use ke liye?
questions.explanation: Domestic applications ke liye B, C aur D type MCBs commonly use hote hain. B type lights aur fans ke liye, C type motors aur inductive loads ke liye, D type high inrush current wale loads ke liye.

questions.question: Agar RCCB baar baar trip ho raha hai, toh kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.C: Circuit mein kahin earth leakage hai ya appliance mein fault hai

questions.explanation: RCCB ka baar baar trip hona earth leakage current ki presence ko indicate karta hai, jo kisi faulty appliance ya wiring insulation ke damage hone se ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Plate earthing mein electrode kis material ka hota hai?
questions.explanation: Plate earthing mein copper ya Galvanized Iron (GI) ki plate ko zameen mein gaad kar earthing provide ki jati hai.

questions.question: Surge protector kis se bachav provide karta hai?
questions.explanation: Surge protector electrical surges ya voltage spikes se sensitive electronic appliances ko protect karta hai, jo lightning ya switching operations se ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Miniature Circuit Breaker (MCB) ka kya fayda hai fuse ke mukable?

options.B: Ek baar use hone ke baad replace karna padta hai
options.C: Reset kiya ja sakta hai aur zyada reliable protection deta hai

questions.explanation: MCB ko trip hone ke baad manually reset kiya ja sakta hai, jabki fuse ko replace karna padta hai. MCB zyada precise aur reliable protection deta hai.

questions.question: Domestic wiring mein konsa earthing system commonly use hota hai?
questions.explanation: India mein domestic wiring ke liye TT earthing system commonly use hota hai, jisme consumer premises par alag earthing electrode hota hai.

questions.question: Agar ek circuit mein fuse bar bar ud raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?
questions.explanation: Fuse ka baar baar udna circuit mein overload ya short circuit ki indication hai, jise investigate karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Earth resistance ko kam karne ke liye kya kiya jata hai?

options.A: Earth electrode ka size kam karein
options.B: Zameen mein namak aur charcol milayein

questions.explanation: Earth resistance ko kam karne ke liye earth pit mein namak aur charcol (kohla) ki parat dali jati hai, jo conductivity badhati hai.

questions.question: ELCB ka kya matlab hai?
questions.explanation: ELCB ka full form Earth Leakage Circuit Breaker hai, jo RCCB ki tarah hi earth leakage se protection deta hai.

questions.question: MCB ko connect karne ka sahi tarika kya hai?

options.B: Series mein, live wire ke saath

questions.explanation: MCB ko hamesha circuit ke live wire ke saath series mein connect kiya jata hai taaki woh current flow ko interrupt kar sake.

questions.question: Domestic installation mein earth continuity test kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Yeh confirm karne ke liye ki sabhi exposed metallic parts theek se earth hain

questions.explanation: Earth continuity test se ensure hota hai ki sabhi metallic enclosures aur equipment ka earthing path sahi hai aur fault current safely discharge ho sakta hai, jisse shock ka khatra nahi hota.

questions.question: Kaun sa device overcurrent aur short circuit se protection provide karta hai, lekin earth leakage se nahi?
questions.explanation: MCB primarily overcurrent (overload) aur short circuit se protection deta hai, jabki RCCB/ELCB earth leakage se protection dete hain. RCBO dono ka combined function provide karta hai.

questions.question: Bijli ka bill kam karne ke liye customer ko kya salah denge?

options.B: Energy-efficient appliances (5-star rating) use karein aur unnecessary lights/fans band rakhein

questions.explanation: Energy-efficient appliances ka use aur unnecessary power consumption ko kam karna bijli ka bill kam karne ka sabse effective tarika hai.

questions.question: Ek electrician ko customer ke ghar mein kaam karte samay kaisa vyavhar karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Professionalism, politeness aur respect customer satisfaction aur good reputation ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Electrical wiring ki regular checking kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Bijli ka bill badhane ke liye
options.B: Faults, wear and tear ko detect aur prevent karne ke liye
options.C: Customer ko pareshan karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular checking se potential faults, loose connections, ya damaged insulation ko time par detect kiya ja sakta hai, jisse accidents aur bade repairs se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Dead/faulty electrical components ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Dead electrical components (e-waste) ko proper e-waste collection centres par dispose karna chahiye, kyunki unmein harmful chemicals ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Customer ko electrical safety tips dete samay kin baton par zor dena chahiye?

options.B: Overload na karein, damaged cords use na karein, aur pani ke paas bijli ke upkaran na rakhein

questions.explanation: Basic safety rules jaise overload avoid karna, damaged equipment se bachna, aur pani ke paas electrical appliances ka use na karna, ghar mein bijli ki suraksha ke liye bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: Job card ya work report banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Future reference, billing aur record-keeping ke liye useful hai

questions.explanation: Job card mein kiye gaye kaam, use kiye gaye parts, aur charges ka detailed record hota hai, jo future reference, billing aur transparent record-keeping ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Voltage stabilizer ka kya use hai?

options.B: Incoming voltage fluctuations ko regulate karna

questions.explanation: Voltage stabilizer appliances ko unstable input voltage se hone wale damage se bachane ke liye constant output voltage provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar customer kisi kaam ke liye high-quality material ki demand karta hai, toh electrician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Customer ki demand ko ignore karein
options.C: High-quality material provide karein aur uski cost aur benefits samjhayein
options.D: Kaam karne se mana kar dein

questions.explanation: Customer ki preference ko respect karna chahiye aur high-quality material ke benefits aur uski justified cost ko explain karna chahiye.

questions.question: Electric meter reading kaise check karte hain?

options.B: Meter par display hone wale kWh units ko note karte hain

questions.explanation: Electric meter par display hone wale Kilowatt-hour (kWh) units ko note karke consumption check ki jati hai.

questions.question: Bijli bachane ke liye LED lights ka use kyu recommend kiya jata hai?

options.B: Ye incandescent bulbs se zyada energy efficient aur long-lasting hoti hain

questions.explanation: LED lights incandescent aur CFL bulbs ke mukable significantly kam bijli consume karti hain aur unki lifespan bhi zyada hoti hai.

questions.question: Indian Electricity Rules, 1956 (ya ab Electrical Safety Regulations) ka kya maqsad hai?

options.B: Electrical installations ki safety aur standards maintain karna

questions.explanation: Yeh rules electrical installations, equipment aur wiring ki safety aur quality standards ko ensure karte hain taaki public aur property ko electrical hazards se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Customer ko kaam complete hone ke baad kya provide karna chahiye?

options.B: Warranty information, maintenance tips aur contact details

questions.explanation: Warranty information, proper maintenance tips aur contact details provide karne se customer ka trust badhta hai aur future business ki sambhavna rehti hai.

questions.question: Electrical equipment ki lifespan badhane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Regular cleaning aur proper maintenance karein

questions.explanation: Regular cleaning, proper ventilation aur timely maintenance se electrical equipment ki efficiency aur lifespan badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar customer aapke kaam se santusht nahi hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unki shikayat ko dhyan se sunein aur samasya ka hal nikalne ki koshish karein

questions.explanation: Customer ki feedback ko positively lena aur unki problem ko resolve karne ki koshish karna good customer service ka part hai.

questions.question: Energy audit ka kya maqsad hai?

options.B: Ghar mein energy consumption patterns ko analyze karna aur energy efficiency improve karne ke tarike dhundhna

questions.explanation: Energy audit se ghar ki energy use patterns ko samjha jata hai aur un areas ko identify kiya jata hai jahan energy wastage ho rahi hai, jisse bachav ke upaay sujaye ja sakein.

questions.question: Electrician ko naye electrical standards aur technologies ke bare mein updated kyu rehna chahiye?

options.A: Customer ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Apni skills ko upgrade karne aur safe, efficient solutions provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Electrical field constantly evolve ho raha hai. Naye standards aur technologies ki knowledge se electrician apni services ko behtar bana sakta hai aur modern requirements ko pura kar sakta hai.
